name: Grilled Tuna & Vegetables W/Yellow Pepper Sau
recipeIngredient: 1 zucchini, sliced on bias to 1 cup
1 red onion, sliced in thick rounds
3 Russet potatoes - sliced into 1/4 inch thick wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the tuna steaks with salt and pepper, then rub each steak with garlic oil.
2. Place the tuna on a hot grill and cook until desired temperature is reached.
3. Rub all vegetables (zucchini and red onion) with garlic oil.
4. Grill the zucchini and red onion until tender.
5. Season the grilled vegetables with pepper and sprinkle with balsamic vinegar.
6. To make the yellow pepper sauce:
a. Heat olive oil in a 1-quart saucepot.
b. Add chopped onions and sauté until lightly browned.
c. Add chopped yellow bell peppers and thyme, cooking for 1 minute.
d. Pour in chicken stock and simmer covered until peppers are soft.
e. Remove from heat and puree the mixture in a blender.
f. Adjust seasoning as needed and keep warm.
Spoon the sauce over the grilled tuna and vegetables before serving.
